hero_description: I build scalable, mobile-first digital experiences for the web.
about_paragraph_1: I'm a full-stack engineer with 5+ years delivering production web products for the US market — fintech with secure authentication, regulated multi-state SaaS, and performance-focused e-commerce platforms.
about_paragraph_2: My main stack is React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind. I've built secure-session e-wallets, data-intensive portals, jurisdiction-configurable platforms, and legacy BI migrations to Spark + Superset.
about_paragraph_3: I take end-to-end ownership: from spec to post-launch maintenance. Self-taught, proactive, and obsessive about DX, product quality, and accessibility.
about_paragraph_4: Outside of work, I practice Shotokan Karate (2nd Dan), learn about technology, and play exploration and fantasy titles. I believe that good code and martial arts share clarity, discipline, and constant improvement.
about_quote: I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.
hero_description_long: A full-stack engineer at the intersection of aesthetic precision and technical robustness. Five years delivering real products for the US market — secure-auth fintech wallets, regulated SaaS, and mobile-first e-commerce platforms.
hero_comet_caption: comets like ideas — brief, unique, unrepeatable
product_description: Lab2Next is a SaaS for clinical laboratories — patient registration, quality control, digital-signature result delivery, full audit trails, and role-based staff management. Guided workflows that reduce errors and accelerate report turnaround. Built, launched, and maintained independently.
projects_confidentiality: Most of my professional projects are private or internal due to corporate confidentiality agreements.

enti.title: Full Stack at ENTI
enti.description:
End-to-end web product delivery for US and LATAM clients.

Currently in production: mobile-first e-wallet in Next.js with secure sessions — HTTPOnly cookies, token refresh, and protected REST endpoints. Migrated the data layer from DynamoDB to Django microservices and legacy Power BI dashboards to SparkSQL jobs in Scala on Superset.

softtek.title: Full Stack at Softtek
softtek.description:
Regulated loan management platform for US lending operations across multiple state jurisdictions.

Built jurisdiction-configurable form rules: one codebase enforcing state-by-state regulatory requirements without forking. Contributed to a multi-quarter .NET legacy migration and took end-to-end ownership of triage — bugs, new form fields, and registration logic in a regulated environment.

scandia.title: Full Stack at Scandia
scandia.description:
Frontend and technical SEO for Scandia's e-commerce storefront portfolio — saunas, spas, and wellness products.

Performance and SEO optimizations that improved organic ranking and top-of-funnel traffic across multiple brands. Shopify theme customization, third-party API integration, and pixel-accurate responsive layouts from Figma.

iotam.title: Full Stack at IOTAM
iotam.description: IoT startup (field data metering) — refactored the client app to support product growth. Improved component responsiveness and maintainability, coordinated with backend for reliable data flow from physical meters, and worked with design on data visualization and UI states.

brightcoders.title: Full Stack Internship at BrightCoders
brightcoders.description: Intensive professional development program using Ruby on Rails — code challenges in small teams and a collaborative final project.

wallet-app.title: Wallet App
wallet-app.description: Wallet application with authentication, sending, receiving, and transaction management.

scandia-ecommerce.title: Scandia Manufacturing
scandia-ecommerce.description: Collaborated on building pages, components, and responsiveness for this industry-leading e-commerce site.

saunas-com.title: Saunas.com
saunas-com.description: E-commerce platform for sauna and steam room products. Feature-rich implementation related to Scandia Mfg.

sun-valley-salt.title: Sun Valley Salt
sun-valley-salt.description: E-commerce platform for Himalayan salt wall panels. Manufacturing and customization focus.
